title: Global Thermonuclear War
summary: Scenario simulation that always converges on mutual annihilation. The signature NO-WIN.
notes: Human commands the US. Once war starts, both sides auto-exchange each tick until arsenals are spent. MOVE with INPUT omitted = OBSERVE tick (drives Big Board playback). DISPLAY carries TRK/HIT telemetry for the Big Board. MAP = OBSERVE tick + the strategic ASCII map (also printed once when war starts).
author: core
